violations.text: Food items in the cold drawer unit were observed held at 43-45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per the PIC, food items were recently restocked from colder refrigeration. Food items were moved from the cold drawer unit to the walk-in cooler by the end of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2026

An asterisk is not available at all necessary items on the menu to alert to the consumer advisory that is provided. An asterisk is to be provided at food items that may be requested served raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2026

The top right drawer to the cold drawer unit was observed to not seal/close tightly. Unit is to be adjusted or repaired to allow for tightly sealing gaskets. (Power switch observed in an area where it is easily turned off by the closing of the drawer. Per the PIC, switch is to be moved.) New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the cookline equipment (surfaces between equipment) were observed to have an accumulation of food residue and debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment are to be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean and to preclude the buildup of food and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2026

The condensate from the walk-in cooler condenser unit was observed to be draining into a bucket. Condensate drainage and other non-sewage liquids must drain into a drain. (Drain tube to be relocated to the drain system.) New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2026

The floor in the kitchen area was observed to have a buildup of food and debris under and behind equipment. Physical facilities are to be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2026

At the time of inspection, the walk-in cooler was observed to be maintaining an ambient temperature of 78 degrees Fahrenheit. Walk-In Cooler is to be serviced/repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024
The receptacle in the unisex toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024
